calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Allen Honigman, DDS, MS, PLLC or Allen Honigman.
Defaults were entered against defendants on September 22, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 22, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 13, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Allen Honigman, DDS, MS, PLLC and Allen Honigman as follows:

Damages/Principal - $224,948.27.
Prejudgment Interest - $12,570.48.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $465.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $240,483.75.

Additionally, it is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in paragraph three of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Continued To Nov-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO STRIKE GENERAL DENIAL
Off Calendar Jul-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S ANSWER IN ITS ENTIRETY. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: is granted, with ten days leave to amend. Self represented defendant Honigman must amend the answer in his individual capacity. LLC must be represented by an attorney to defend this action. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: JoAnn Bryce CSR 3321

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
